query: direct on-camera flash snapshot harsh shadow red eye unflattering party
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: harsh flash — direct on-camera flash, red-eye, party snapshot aesthetic, hard shadows, unflattering documentary realism

response.objective_caption: A claw hammer with a light wooden handle swings down toward a black Vivitar 110 TF TELE point-and-shoot camera resting on a white textured surface against a solid black background. The compact camera features a built-in flash unit, a viewfinder labeled 'Vivitar,' and a small red indicator light.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A claw hammer with a light wooden handle, its metal head streaked with pronounced motion blur, swings down toward a black Vivitar 110 TF TELE point-and-shoot camera resting on a white textured surface against a solid black background. The blur traces the arc of the descending hammer while the camera below remains in focus, showing its built-in flash, 'Vivitar' viewfinder, and small red indicator light.
